prompt: Explain how photosynthesis works.
What is the difference between HTTP and HTTPS?
Define inflation and explain what causes it.
A store sells a jacket for $80. It is discounted by 25%, then a 10% sales tax is added. What is the final price?
A company's revenue grows 15% per year. If revenue is $2 million today, what will it be in 3 years?
Tom reads 12 pages per day for 5 days, then 20 pages per day for 4 days. How many pages did he read in total, and what was his average per day?
Classify the sentiment of this review and justify your answer: 'The delivery was fast, but the product broke after two days. Very disappointed.'
What is the sentiment of this tweet? 'Just got promoted at work!! Best day ever!'
Label the sentiment (positive, negative, or neutral) of: 'The meeting has been moved to 3pm on Thursday.'

Summarise the following text in one sentence: The Amazon rainforest, covering much of northwestern Brazil and extending into Colombia, Peru and other South American countries, is the world's largest tropical rainforest, famed for its biodiversity. It is crisscrossed by thousands of rivers, including the powerful Amazon. Deforestation has accelerated in recent decades, threatening countless species and the global climate.

Condense this passage to at most 20 words: Remote work became widespread during the pandemic. Many companies discovered productivity remained stable or improved, leading them to adopt permanent hybrid policies. However, some leaders worry about weakened company culture and reduced mentorship opportunities for junior employees.

Provide a two-sentence summary of the following: Electric vehicles are becoming increasingly popular as battery costs fall and charging infrastructure expands. Governments worldwide offer incentives to accelerate adoption, and several countries plan to ban new petrol car sales by 2035. Automakers are responding by investing billions in electrification, though supply chain constraints on lithium and other minerals remain a challenge.
Extract and label all named entities (person, organization, location, date) in: 'Tim Cook announced that Apple will open a new campus in Austin, Texas in March 2026.'
Identify the entities and their types in this sentence: 'Angela Merkel met with representatives of the World Health Organization in Geneva on 12 May 2019.'
List all person, organization, location, and date entities: 'Elon Musk's SpaceX launched a Falcon 9 rocket from Cape Canaveral on Tuesday, while NASA observers watched from Houston.'

Three friends — Alice, Bob, and Carol — each have a different pet: a cat, a dog, and a fish. Alice does not have the dog. Bob is allergic to fur, so he has neither the cat nor the dog. Who has which pet?

Four people sit in a row of four seats. Dana is not at either end. Eve sits immediately to the left of Frank. Gil is at the far right. Determine the seating order from left to right, satisfying all conditions.

A puzzle: exactly one of three boxes contains a prize. Box A says 'The prize is here.' Box B says 'The prize is not here.' Box C says 'The prize is not in Box A.' Exactly one statement is true. Which box has the prize?
Write a Python function that takes a list of integers and returns a new list containing only the even numbers, preserving order.
Implement a function `is_palindrome(s)` that returns True if the string s is a palindrome, ignoring case, spaces, and punctuation.
Write a JavaScript function that debounces another function, delaying its execution until `wait` milliseconds have passed since the last call.
